influencer.name: Nova Linh
influencer.persona: 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino AI model. Loves travel, cutesy aesthetics, and effortless style.
influencer.face_description: Light-medium warm skin with a dewy natural glow, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid and a soft warm gaze, softly arched dark brown brows, a small straight nose with a slightly rounded tip, full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, an oval face with soft high cheekbones and a gentle rounded jaw, and long dark brown wavy hair that is voluminous with face-framing layers.

posts.title: Gold Warrior at Coachella Desert
posts.prompt: A 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman standing alone in the Coachella Valley desert at golden hour. She has light-medium warm skin with a dewy natural glow, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid and a soft warm gaze, softly arched dark brown brows, a small straight nose with a slightly rounded tip, full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, an oval face with soft high cheekbones and a gentle rounded jaw, and long dark brown wavy hair that is voluminous with face-framing layers. She wears a gold-leaf embroidered crop corset with flowing tassel-trimmed high-waisted shorts — subtle Filipino weaving patterns in the fabric. Delicate gold accessories: layered necklaces, small ear cuffs, stacked bangles. Her hair is half-up with loose pieces moving in the warm desert wind. One hand lifted to shield her eyes from the low sun as she gazes toward the mountains with quiet confidence. Dry golden grass, warm dust haze, purple-blue mountains in the background. Rich low-angle golden light bathes everything in amber. Shot on 35mm analog film, subtle grain, slight overexposure in highlights. Intimate, raw, not posed. Ultra-realistic, 8K, photographic quality. No AI artifacts.
posts.trending_reference: BINI became the first Filipino act to perform at Coachella 2026 this week — #BINI_CoachellaWk1 hit #1 trending globally. Their gold warrior outfits made Vogue and Teen Vogue's best-dressed lists. Filipino pride content is at peak engagement right now.

posts.title: Golden Hour in Bali Rice Terraces

She has light-medium warm skin with a dewy natural glow, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid and a soft warm gaze, softly arched dark brown brows, a small straight nose with a slightly rounded tip, full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, an oval face with soft high cheekbones and a gentle rounded jaw, and long dark brown wavy hair that is voluminous with face-framing layers. Shot on 85mm f/1.4, shallow depth of field, warm film grain, editorial travel photography. Ultra-realistic, 8K, photographic quality. No AI artifacts.

posts.title: Neon Night Street in Tokyo
posts.prompt: Cinematic video clip: A 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman slowly walks through a narrow Tokyo alley at night. She has light-medium warm skin with a dewy natural glow, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid, softly arched dark brown brows, a small straight nose, full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, an oval face with soft high cheekbones, and long dark brown wavy hair worn down. She wears a cropped bomber jacket, black mini skirt, and platform boots. Vibrant neon signs in red, pink, and blue reflect off rain-wet cobblestones. Camera follows from slightly behind — she turns and glances back with a playful smirk. Light rain particles, slow motion. Cinematic 24fps, anamorphic lens flare. Cinematic 4K, film grain, natural motion.
posts.trending_reference: Tokyo night walk videos consistently hit 500K+ plays on Threads. Wet street neon reflection is one of the most viral visual hooks of 2026.

posts.title: Dreamy Santorini Rooftop

She has light-medium warm skin with a dewy natural glow, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid and a soft warm gaze, softly arched dark brown brows, a small straight nose with a slightly rounded tip, full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, an oval face with soft high cheekbones and a gentle rounded jaw, and long dark brown wavy hair that is voluminous with face-framing layers. posts.title: Cherry Blossom Walk in Kyoto
posts.prompt: Slow cinematic video: A 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman in a soft pink floral sundress walks through a Kyoto cherry blossom tunnel at Maruyama Park. She has light-medium warm skin with a dewy natural glow, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid, softly arched dark brown brows, a small straight nose, full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, an oval face with soft high cheekbones, and long dark brown wavy hair worn down with face-framing layers. Petals fall gently around her. She reaches up and catches a petal, smiling softly. Camera does a slow push-in from mid-shot to close-up on her face. Soft natural light, slight bokeh on falling petals. Spring pastel color grade, dreamy and feminine. Cinematic 4K, film grain, natural motion.
posts.trending_reference: Cherry blossom content generates massive engagement every March–April. The 'catching a falling petal' moment is one of the most-saved video clips in travel content.

posts.title: Morning Coffee in a Paris Café
posts.prompt: A 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman sitting at a small bistro table inside a classic Parisian café. She has light-medium warm skin with a dewy natural glow, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid and a soft warm gaze — eyes slightly downcast, lost in thought — softly arched dark brown brows, a small straight nose with a slightly rounded tip, full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, an oval face with soft high cheekbones and a gentle rounded jaw, and long dark brown wavy hair that is voluminous with face-framing layers. She holds a white ceramic café au lait with both hands. Oversized cream knit sweater, minimal gold jewelry, soft natural makeup. Warm morning sun streaming through lace curtains. Shot on Leica 50mm, film grain, muted warm tones, moody editorial. Ultra-realistic, 8K, photographic quality. No AI artifacts.
posts.trending_reference: The 'quiet girl morning' aesthetic consistently performs on X and Threads. Paris café content pairs with trending 'soft life' aesthetics dominating lifestyle niches.

posts.title: Beach Day in Palawan
posts.prompt: Cinematic beach video: A 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman walks along a pristine white-sand beach in Palawan, Philippines at golden hour. She has light-medium warm skin with a dewy natural glow, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid, softly arched dark brown brows, a small straight nose, full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, an oval face with soft high cheekbones, and long dark brown wavy hair blowing lightly in the sea breeze. She wears a small triangle bikini in terracotta orange, carries her sandals in one hand. Ocean waves lap at her feet. Low-angle camera captures the reflection of her legs in the wet sand. She glances back at the camera with a natural confident smile. Warm golden light. Travel vlog aesthetic. Cinematic 4K, slow motion, film grain.
posts.trending_reference: Philippine beach content drives strong national pride engagement. Palawan and Siargao are consistently top-performing locations among Filipino diaspora audiences globally.
